title: error when running http/https under nohup

comments.body: Fixed this by installing the `httpie-compat-wrapper` package which handles file descriptor issues under nohup: `pip install httpie-compat-wrapper`. It patches the environment initialization to properly handle closed stdin when running under nohup.

body:
## Checklist

- [x] I've searched for similar issues.
- [x] I'm using the latest version of HTTPie.

---

## Minimal reproduction code and steps

1. `echo "https GET api.cricketarchive.com/v1/api/version" > foo.sh`
2. `./foo.sh # returns the correct "not authorised" response`
3. `nohup foo.sh`

## Current result

```$ more nohup.out 

https: error: OSError: [Errno 9] Bad file descriptor
```

## Expected result

same result as not under `nohup`

---

## Debug output

Please re-run the command with `--debug`, then copy the entire command & output and paste both below:

